entry.title: New: Resolution 2026-21 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-07-08
entry.content:
Urging The State Board Of Land And Natural Resources To Direct The Department Of Land And Natural Resources, Division Of Aquatic Resources, To Adopt Rules, Or Alternatively Urging The Hawai‘i State Legislature To Enact Legislation, Prohibiting The Harvest Of Aquatic Life From State Marine Waters For Commercial Aquarium Purposes

Latest action: On agenda 2026-07-08

View on the council site
